SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SPA") is made on the 15th day of October, 2023.

PARTIES:
1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, Contact Number: +65 9123 4567, Email: tanwm@example.sg
2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No.: S3456789C), residing at 456 Clementi Avenue 3, Singapore 120456, Contact Number: +65 9234 5678, Email: sitiaishah@example.sg
3. ABC Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: 200123456H), with its registered office at 789 Raffles Place, Singapore 048623, Contact Number: +65 9345 6789, Email: contact@abcinnovations.sg

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to enter into this SPA to govern their relationship as shareholders in XYZ Ventures Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456B).

The financial consideration for the SPA shall be SGD 1,500,000.

The shareholders agree that the project plan does not constitute a binding document concerning the project status.

More details can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the day and year first above written.
